name: add_performance_indexes
description: Add additional database indexes for common query patterns: trip listing by date range, summary aggregation by vehicle+category, unbilled trips, gap detection with date, audit trail lookup with version, and route preset suggestion ordering by last_used_at.
up: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_zzp_trips_admin_date ON zzp_trips (administration, trip_date)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_zzp_trips_admin_vehicle_category ON zzp_trips (administration, vehicle_id, trip_category, trip_date)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_zzp_trips_admin_billable_contact ON zzp_trips (administration, is_billable, is_billed, contact_id)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_zzp_trips_vehicle_date_odometer ON zzp_trips (vehicle_id, trip_date, start_odometer)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_zzp_trip_audit_admin_trip_version ON zzp_trip_audit (administration, trip_id, version)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_zzp_route_presets_admin_usage ON zzp_route_presets (administration, last_used_at, use_count)
down: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_zzp_trips_admin_date ON zzp_trips
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_zzp_trips_admin_vehicle_category ON zzp_trips
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_zzp_trips_admin_billable_contact ON zzp_trips
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_zzp_trips_vehicle_date_odometer ON zzp_trips
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_zzp_trip_audit_admin_trip_version ON zzp_trip_audit
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_zzp_route_presets_admin_usage ON zzp_route_presets
